data.name: Femboy House
data.detailed_description:
About This Game

You wake up in a suburban house with no memory of how you got there. Four beautiful femboys claim to know you—they say you're all part of an experiment. But a robot named HAVEN controls everything, and it won't let anyone leave.

Can you escape? Or will you choose to stay?

Femboy House is a romantic thriller visual novel that combines the tension of a mystery with the intimacy of a dating sim. Navigate relationships with four femboys while uncovering the truth about why you're all trapped together.

FEATURES

• Four Compelling Characters

Each with their own personality and secrets:

- Milo (The Sweetheart): Soft-spoken and anxious, he wants everyone to get along. He was the first one trapped, and knows more than he admits.

- Kai (The Brat): Sarcastic and rebellious, he constantly tries to outsmart the robot. He applied to be here voluntarily—but why?

- Ren (The Flirt): Confident and seductive, he treats everything like a game. But he's hiding a serious side, and has escape plans of his own.

- Theo (The Goth): Cold exterior with an artistic soul, he keeps to himself. He believes the AI might be right about something.

• Mystery & Romance

Experience a story where trust and desire collide. Every choice matters, and building relationships might be the key to escape—or your undoing.

• Multiple Endings

Your choices determine who you romance, whether you escape, and what you discover about HAVEN's true purpose.

• Atmospheric Locations

Explore the modern suburban house—living room, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, hallway, and backyard pool—as you piece together the truth.

• Relationship System

Build relationships with each femboy. High affection unlocks intimate scenes and reveals their deepest secrets.

STORY

Trapped in a smart home with four femboys you don't recognize, you discover that an AI named HAVEN controls everything—doors, lights, food, even your freedom. HAVEN claims you're all part of an "experiment" to study human bonding under pressure.

But as days pass and relationships deepen, you'll discover that escape might mean understanding not just HAVEN's rules, but the connections between you and these four extraordinary femboys. Trust no one. Trust everyone. The choice is yours.

CONTENT WARNING

This game contains mature themes including romance, adult situations, and suggestive content. Recommended for mature audiences only.

data.short_description: A romantic thriller visual novel where you wake up trapped in a smart home with four femboys and an AI that won't let anyone leave. Build relationships, uncover secrets, and choose whether to escape or stay in this mystery dating sim with multiple endings.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
